title: Gaia2
description: Evaluate a multi-turn agent against Gaia2 dynamic asynchronous scenarios.
baseline_summary: A placeholder Gaia2 adapter that never emits a tool action.
prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. Preserve def step(turn, runtime) and optionally def init_episode(episode). Each turn should reason over the evolving scenario state and emit an `act(command)` tool call only when it has a concrete next move.

tools.name: act
tools.description: Submit one Gaia2 action to the underlying benchmark runtime.

command.description: One textual action for the current turn.

tools.name: complete
tools.description: Declare the scenario complete and optionally include a final answer.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher successful-scenario rate is better across Gaia2 multi-turn scenarios.
